description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a deploy stage with a single job named pages. The pages job runs on the master branch only, uses the default runner image, and executes the exact shell commands: gem install ronn, mv docs_src public, cd public, ronn -5 --style toc --manual BUILD.PY --organization Ma_124 *.ronn, cp buildpy.1.html index.html, and ls. It then publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact by specifying artifacts.paths: public. Ensure the job is limited to the master branch via an only rule.
